reasoning: The control AU-9(7) focuses on the protection of audit information by storing it on a component with a different operating system, which can be interpreted in Kubernetes as ensuring audit logs are securely stored and protected from tampering. Kubernetes audit logs can be enabled and configured to be sent to an external system for storage, ensuring separation from the main cluster components. Additionally, ensuring the integrity and protection of these logs is crucial, which can be achieved through secure storage practices.
